0010001010101001 1010011110101101 0 -> sum: 1100101001010110, cout: 0

0101000010111100 1111110001110100 1 -> sum: 0100110100110001, cout: 1
1010110101000100 1001100101011011 0 -> sum: 0100011010011111, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
